text.title: Design-to-Dev Handoff Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Design-to-Dev Handoff end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: fill-spec
step.action: Fill handoff-spec-template; resolve every state and token.

step.name: co-write-ac
step.action: Designer + eng draft acceptance criteria together.

step.name: sync-and-close
step.action: Hold sync; eng signs off; convert to async if needed.
